'''Phraetiss''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Farrfin sector/Legends|Farrfin sector]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]] with thick and very tall grasslands.

[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] ran a botched operation on Phraetiss about ten [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the rise of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. It was there that he made the acquaintance of the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Niles Ferrier]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The PC game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] places Phraetiss in the "Farfin sector", a misspelling of the true Farrfin Sector.
